title: Crispy Show-off Saudic Almond Essence Stir-fry
description: A floral and crispy show-off Saudi Arabian dish featuring almond essence, perfectly seasoned for a raw-friendly snack that's both easy to prepare and delectable.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add almond essence and chili flakes, stirring continuously for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not burnt.
Mix in ginger paste and scallions. Cook for another minute until the ingredients are well combined and heated through.
Drizzle with lemon juice to enhance flavors and adjust seasoning with salt if needed.
Serve immediately as a raw-friendly snack or garnish over fresh greens or crackers.
